description: Public-safe template. Put private voice profiles and reference media in ignored local files.

segments.title: Punctuation
segments.script: I changed the pacing system again. It no longer ignores punctuation, and it should breathe before moving on.

segments.title: Clean Boundaries
segments.script: Each segment should start cleanly, end cleanly, and avoid mechanical noise between takes.

segments.title: Long Form
segments.script: This is a longer narration sample for testing whether the voice keeps a natural pace over time. It should not rush through commas, swallow the last word, or sound like it is running out of air near the end.
